job: Turn one creator capsule into a checked Manim scene blueprint and generated Python scene stub so an explainer can move from memory card to renderer without adding Manim to the DASH core or committing raw video.

manim_adapter.runtime_boundary: Manim Community Edition remains an external renderer. This repo emits a checked scene contract, a generated Python stub in ignored .artifacts, and a fixed-canvas proof card; it does not add renderer dependencies or store video output.
dependencies: external Manim Community Edition install in the creator workspace
DASH core keeps only JSON, HTML proof, and the Bun validation script
rendered MP4 files stay outside git unless separately reviewed as tiny public previews

beats.title: Capsule seed
beats.visual: A warm memory card enters over a dark grid and names intent, creator, and surface.
beats.motion: Fade in card, draw a thin blue frame, then pulse the intent line once.
beats.narration_intent: Tell the creator this scene starts from the capsule, not from a blank renderer.

beats.title: Grammar lock
beats.visual: Three labeled rails show palette, geometry, and motion grammar as reusable constraints.
beats.motion: Rails slide in left to right while small dots trace a safe remix path.
beats.narration_intent: Show which visual rules survive the first render and future remixes.

beats.title: Scene build
beats.visual: A simple node chain turns capsule fields into title, proof stamp, and beat cards.
beats.motion: Nodes connect with animated lines, then collapse into one Manim scene class badge.
beats.narration_intent: Make the adapter feel executable: the output is a scene class, not a mood board.

beats.title: Proof gate
beats.visual: A checklist blocks raw media, private paths, provider logs, and account screenshots.
beats.motion: Each blocked input is crossed out before the render command is revealed.
beats.narration_intent: Normalize proof before render so creators do not leak private material.

beats.title: Renderer handoff
beats.visual: The generated command appears beside a small scene-class ticket and remix handles.
beats.motion: Command types on, ticket stamps external runtime, then handles orbit the scene badge.
beats.narration_intent: Leave the creator with a copyable external Manim handoff and clear remix handles.

remix_handles: render quality flag outside the repo
blocked_moves: adding Manim as a core dependency from a single adapter win
committing rendered MP4 output or raw source media
using private prompts, client copy, provider logs, account screenshots, cookies, or secrets
skipping browser measure and print proof for the fixed-canvas scene card

blocked: private prompts or private client copy
raw generated video, raw source media, and renderer caches
local absolute paths and provider execution logs
API keys, cookies, tokens, secrets, and account screenshots
unreviewed third-party assets or proprietary fonts

retention: Retain creator-manim-scene-route as an edge adapter: JSON contract, generated ignored Python stub, fixed-canvas proof card, and validation script. Do not promote a package primitive until another renderer adapter repeats the same capsule-to-code handoff pattern.
